lineup_source: Canada vs Qatar, Group B, 18 June 2026, Vancouver (4-4-2)

players.name: Maxime Crépeau
players.note: Born in Greenfield Park, Quebec. Father Rémi Crépeau born in Quebec; mother Huguette Brodeur born in Greenfield Park, QC. Fully French-Canadian family.

players.name: Richie Laryea
players.note: Born in Toronto, Ontario. MLS article states 'born to Ghanaian parents'; speaks Ga. Mother's father played professionally in Ghana. Both parents documented as Ghanaian (medium confidence as exact birthplaces not individually confirmed).

players.name: Luc de Fougerolles
players.note: Born in London, England. Wikipedia: 'born in England to a French-Canadian father and an Iranian-born English mother.' Father identified as French-Canadian (born in Canada, medium confidence as birthplace not individually confirmed); mother explicitly described as Iranian-born.

players.name: Derek Cornelius
players.note: Wikipedia: 'Cornelius was born in Ajax, Ontario to a Barbadian father and a Jamaican mother.'

players.name: Alistair Johnston
players.note: Wikipedia: 'born in Vancouver' with 'a Canadian father and an Irish mother from Poleglass' in Northern Ireland. Mother's origin documented as Northern Ireland (part of UK/Ireland).

players.name: Ali Ahmed
players.note: Born in Toronto, Ontario. Wikipedia: 'born in Toronto to parents from Ethiopia.' Feature article (iqra.ca): 'born to Ethiopian parents, Afendi and Muna, who emigrated from Badeaa in the Oromia region.' Family lived in Italy before settling in Canada.

players.name: Stephen Eustáquio
players.note: Born in Leamington, Ontario. Wikipedia: 'born in Canada to Portuguese parents'; moved to Portugal at age 7 and holds dual Canadian-Portuguese nationality.

players.name: Ismaël Koné
players.note: Born in Abidjan, Ivory Coast. Father Salifou Koné and mother Suzanne Diomandé both born in Yopougon, Côte d'Ivoire. Family relocated to Montréal in 2010 when he was seven.

players.name: Tajon Buchanan
players.note: Born in Brampton, Ontario. Mother Geraldeen Taylor was born in Jamaica. Father (deceased) also of Jamaican descent; father's exact birthplace not individually confirmed (medium confidence). Holds Canadian and Jamaican citizenship.

players.name: Jonathan David
players.note: Wikipedia: 'David was born in Brooklyn, New York, to Haitian parents. The family moved to Port-au-Prince when he was three months old.' Grew up in Belgium; holds Canadian, Haitian, and Belgian nationalities.

players.name: Cyle Larin
players.note: Born in Brampton, Ontario. Father was born in Clarendon, Jamaica; mother Patricia Larin was born in Montreal, Canada.
